_comment: Role -> permission grants, migrated from ISF DA InitPermission (GrantAgentUsePmsForAppAdmin + GrantMgmtPmsForAppAdmin). Each grant binds a role to all listed ops on resource_type:id_pattern. id_pattern '*' = whole type (keyMatch). Data/AI-admin grants are TODO — their full op sets live in the data-lake/dataflow modules; add when those modules' registration is migrated.
